basic_details.job_title: IRFC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Dy. Manager, Jr. Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Dy. Manager, Jr. Manager and More
basic_details.short_information: Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited has released the official Various Managerial Posts Notification 2026 on 22 April 2026 at IRFC Official Website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the IRFC Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged as per official notification and holding qualifications such as Graduate / PG / MBA / CA / CMA / BE / B.Tech / MCA / Hindi Literature / English Translation with relevant experience can apply offline up to 15 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / PG / MBA / CA / CMA / BE / B.Tech / MCA / Hindi Literature / English Translation
qualification.details: Jr. Manager (Hindi): Post Graduate in Hindi Literature + Degree/PG Diploma in English/Hindi Translation. Minimum 12 years experience (min 10 in Govt/PSEs). Asst. Manager / Dy. Manager (IT): BE/B.Tech (CS/IT) or MCA or MBA(IT). Minimum 8 years experience. Personal Private Secretary (PPS): Graduate/PG + Shorthand 100 wpm & Typing 40 wpm. Minimum 15 years in secretarial field. Dy. Manager (Finance): CA/CMA OR MBA/PGDM (Finance). Minimum 4 years experience (min 2 in Govt/PSEs). Manager (Business Development): MBA(Finance) / M.Com (LLB desirable). Minimum 12 years experience. Joint General Manager: Graduate / PG / MBA/PGDM. Minimum 15 years experience in financing rolling stock & railway projects.

salary_details.details: Jr. Manager (Hindi): Rs. 30,000-1,20,000 (IDA) Asst. Manager / Dy. Manager (IT): Rs. 40,000-1,40,000 / Rs. 50,000-1,60,000 (IDA) Personal Private Secretary (PPS): Rs. 50,000-1,60,000 (IDA) Dy. Manager (Finance): Rs. 50,000-1,60,000 (IDA) Manager (Business Development): Rs. 60,000-1,80,000 (IDA) Joint General Manager: Rs. 80,000-2,20,000 (IDA)

selection_process: Shortlisting of eligible candidates Interview + Power Point Presentation Assessment of last 3 years APARs
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IRFC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.irfc.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IRFC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the various managerial posts at IRFC is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IRFC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various managerial positions in the Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IRFC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies for each post, ranging from Rs. 30,000-1,20,000 (IDA) for Jr. Manager (Hindi) to Rs. 80,000-2,20,000 (IDA) for Joint General Manager.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for IRFC Managerial Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of eligible candidates, followed by an interview and a power point presentation. The assessment of the last 3 years APARs will also be considered.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IRFC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post. They range from Post Graduate in Hindi Literature, BE/B.Tech (CS/IT), CA/CMA, MBA/PGDM (Finance), to Graduate/PG/MBA/PGDM for different roles.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Deputation, meaning candidates will be appointed on deputation from their parent organization.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section below. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IRFC?
faq.answer: The official website of Indian Railway Finance Corporation Limited is www.irfc.co.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download the application form.
